Stay
Cabin Rentals · Guatapé
About
We've reserved all the cabins in the resort for Kon.X.ion attendees. Wake up in the mountains of Guatape, steps from the festival.
What's Included With cabin rental
· Welcome drink when arrived at Bethel Lozana
· Free breakfast
· Electric meditation class (1.5 hours)
· Free padel class at @lamayoriapadelclub (2 people)
· Mystery gift box
· Sauna
· WiFi
· Room service
· Hot tub
· Kayak
Cabin Details
· 4 luxury cabins — sleeps 2 or 4
1 California King bed or 2 double beds View ›
· 4 premium cabins — sleeps 4
2 double beds View ›
